+ sections 目录 ├── raw/ │ ├── 0_response.html # 章节索引页 │ ├── 1_response.html # Section 1 原始 HTML │ └── ... # 每节一个原始文件 └── sections/ ├── section_1.md # Section 1 Markdown ├── section_2.md └── ... ``` ### 章节标签 除通用标签（dimensional, setback, height 等）外，MGLCrawler 识别以下专属标签： | 标签 | 含义 | |------|------| | `affordable_housing` | 经济适用房相关条款 | | `smart_growth` | 40R/40S 智慧增长条款 | | `historic` | 历史保护区条款 | | `wetlands` | 湿地保护条款 | | `building_code` | 建筑规范条款 | | `nonconforming` | 既有不合规建筑条款 | | `subdivision` | 土地分割条款 | | `zba` | Zoning Board of Appeals 相关 | ### 已知限制 - 不处理引用其他法律的条款（如 MGL 40A §3 引用联邦电信法） - 部分章节有表格（如罚款金额），HTML 表格会转换为 Markdown 表格，可能有格式损失 - 每次爬取约 3 分钟（0.5s × 352 节），不建议频繁重爬（每月一次即可） --- ## AmlegalCrawler（American Legal Publishing） **source_type**: `amlegal` **数据源**: `codelibrary.amlegal.com` **版本**: v0.6.0（P51） ### 适用场景 American Legal Publishing 平台托管的城镇法规集（覆盖 FL/AR/AZ/CA/IL/MT/MD 等多州）。 站点是 SPA：左侧 sidebar 是 nav tree（Title / Chapter / Article / § Section 多级嵌套）， 右侧 `#codecontent` 是法条正文。需要 Camoufox 渲染 + BFS 遍历 sidebar 抓所有叶节点。 ### P51 关键契约 P51 之前 amlegal 爬取存在 4 类问题：(a) `ZONING_KEYWORDS` 关键词门控掩盖 CHARTER / GENERAL PROVISIONS / OFFENSES 等非 zoning 章节；(b) sidebar 锚文本（章节编号） 被当作章节标题，导致 markdown 顶部全是无意义编号；(c) 平台 chrome（toolbar / share / print / annotations / breadcrumb / footer）随 `#codecontent.outerHTML` 一起入 markdown；(d) 同一章下多个 `§` 子节合并成单一巨型 markdown，`segment()` 不拆分。 P51 引入以下契约： 1. **`full_code: bool = True` 默认全量抓取**：通过 `crawler_cls("amlegal")()` 零参实例化时，BFS 顶层不再施加 zoning 关键词过滤。需要兼容旧行为时构造为 `AmlegalCrawler(full_code=False)`。 2. **真实标题来源**：每个叶节点 fetch 后用 page.evaluate 在 `#codecontent` 内 找首个非 trivial `h1/h2/h3` 文本作为 `effective_title`，覆盖 sidebar 锚文本。 3. **chrome 双层过滤**：`_strip_chrome` 在 BS4 阶段 `decompose()` 14 类 selector（`.btn-toolbar`、`[role='toolbar']`、`[class*='share']`、`[class*='print']`、 `.annotations-toggle`、`nav`、`footer` 等），随后 `_scrub_chrome_text` 在 markdown 文本上做行级 token 抠除（"Annotations Off" / "Share" / "Print" / "Code of Ordinances" 等高频残留）。 4. **§ 子节扁平化拆分**：`SUBSEC_RE = ^#{2,6}\s*§\s*\s+` 在每个 chapter markdown 上 `finditer`；preamble 入 `level=1, parent_id=None` 的章节 节点；每个匹配段切成 `level=2, parent_id=chapter_id` 的子节点（扁平结构， 不递归）。下游 LLM 提取按 `parent_id` 串回章节上下文。 ### 输出结构 ``` chapter (level=1, parent_id=None) # CHARTER / TITLE I / Chapter 152 ZONING ... ├── § 152.01 Title and authority # level=2, parent_id=chapter_id ├── § 152.02 Definitions # level=2, parent_id=chapter_id └── § 152.03 ... # level=2, parent_id=chapter_id ``` `meta.json` 的 sections 数组对每条记录追加 `level: int` + `parent_id: string|null` 两字段（P51 共享 schema，所有 crawler 适用，向后兼容默认 `level=1, parent_id=None`）。 ### 视觉签收 pilot（10 城镇） P51 选取 10 个 buggy/diverse 城镇覆盖：overview-only / node-id 直跳 / 多 volume / 多 TITLE 横向 / 大型城市 / 不同州 chrome 变体： | 城镇 | 州 | 选型理由 | |---|---|---| | Lake Mary | FL | overview 跳转 buggy（用户截图证据） | | Cave Springs | AR | 小城镇 short-tree | | Apache Junction | AZ | 中型 multi-volume | | El Mirage | AZ | AZ chrome 变体 | | Casa Grande | AZ | 大 AZ 多 TITLE | | Inverness | IL | IL chrome 变体 | | Madera | CA | 多 volume 切换 | | Antioch | CA | CA 多 TITLE | | Cut Bank | MT | MT 单 volume tail-coverage | | Lake Forest | IL | IL 大型多层级 | QA 视觉签收范围 = 10 个城镇 × {章数 ≥ 1, § 子节 ≥ 3 个 `parent_id != None`, 顶级标题非 sidebar 编号, 无 chrome 关键词残留}。 ### 已知限制 - BFS 单页节流 = `MAX_LEAVES=60`（防止超大城镇耗时过长），剩余叶节点 audit log 标记 `truncated=True`。 - depth 上限 = 5；超深的 sub-sub-section（极少见）需要后续提升上限。 - amlegal 平台偶发返回空 `#codecontent`（懒加载），P51 没有自动 retry， 失败叶记入 audit 失败列表，下次重爬即可恢复。 --- ## 3. 三阶段处理流程：fetch → clean → segment 每个 Crawler 都继承 `BaseCrawler`，实现同一套三阶段接口： ```python class BaseCrawler(ABC): async def fetch(url, **kwargs) -> list[RawContent] # 获取原始数据 async def clean(raw_contents) -> str # 清洗 → 纯 Markdown async def segment(content) -> list[Section] # 分段 ``` ### 阶段 1：fetch() 输出 `list[RawContent]`，每个元素对应一个章节或页面的原始数据： ```python @dataclass class RawContent: content: str | bytes # HTML 字符串 或 PDF 二进制 content_type: str # "html" | "pdf" | "text" url: str # 来源 URL images: dict[str, bytes] # {文件名: 图片字节} 已下载的图片 attachments: list[str] # 外部附件 URL ``` ### 阶段 2：clean() 将 `list[RawContent]` 合并为单一 Markdown 字符串。 核心转换由 `segmenter.html_to_markdown()` 完成： | HTML 元素 | 转换结果 | |-----------|---------| | `

`~`

` | `#`~`######` 标题 | | `

` | 普通段落 | | `` | Markdown 表格（含列对齐标记行）| | `
    /
      ` | `-` / `1.` 列表 | | `` | `[text](url)`（外部链接）/ 纯文字（`#` 锚点）| | `` | `![alt](src)` | | `/` | `**text**` | | `/` | `*text*` | ### 阶段 3：segment() 按章节边界切分 Markdown，生成 `list[Section]`： ```python @dataclass class Section: id: str # URL 安全的唯一标识（如 chapter_175_zoning） title: str # 章节标题 content: str # Markdown 正文 tags: list[str] # 自动标注（dimensional/use/overlay/parking/...） ``` **Tags 自动识别关键词**： - `dimensional`：dimension, setback, height, lot area, FAR, coverage - `use`：use, permitted, prohibited, special permit - `overlay`：overlay, special district, conservation - `parking`：parking, loading - `definition`：definition, terminology --- ## 4. 本地存储结构 每次爬取产生一个**不可变的快照目录**： ``` data/zoning_codes/ └── {data_source_id}/ # UUID from JDSR data_source.id └── {YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS}/ # 爬取时间戳 ├── meta.json # artifact_id + hashes + sections index ├── raw/ # 原始 HTTP 响应备份（不可变） │ └── 0_response.html └── sections/ # 分段 Markdown ├── art04_dimensional_requirements.md └── ... ``` > **注意**：旧格式 `data/zoning_codes/MA/{town}/` 已废弃，现通过 `data_source_id` 路由。 完整目录示例（含所有可选子目录）： ``` data/zoning_codes/ └── {data_source_id}/ ← UUID（对应 DB data_source 记录） └── {YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS}/ ← 爬取时间戳（每次爬取独立目录） ├── meta.json ← 完整元数据 + 章节索引 ├── index.json ← meta.json 别名（向后兼容） ├── raw/ ← 原始响应（不可变，用于审计） │ ├── 0_response.html ← ecode360/Municode/MGL: 每章节一个 HTML │ ├── 1_response.html │ └── ...（或 0_response.pdf） ├── sections/ ← 分段 Markdown（供 LLM 处理） │ ├── chapter_175_zoning_...md │ ├── article_5000_development_...md │ └── ... └── images/ ← 下载的图片（HTML/PDF 爬虫） ├── page1_fig1.jpeg ← PDF 嵌入图（命名规则：page{N}_fig{M}） └── facade_diagram.png ← HTML 内联图 ``` ### meta.json 结构 ```json { "data_source_id": "655c0581-ba0a-4371-967a-6048156cdbfe", "jurisdiction_slug": "MA/abington", "source_type": "ecode360", "source_url": "https://ecode360.com/AB2001", "fetched_at": "2026-03-29T20:50:14Z", "raw_content_hash": "24e892a8...", ← 原始文件 SHA-256（审计用） "processed_content_hash": "0ba9bfb5...", ← 处理后内容 SHA-256 "raw_files": ["raw/0_response.html", "raw/1_response.html", ...], "image_files": ["images/pdf.gif"], "raw_size_bytes": 460609, "processed_size_bytes": 241137, "sections_count": 52, "sections": [ { "id": "chapter_175_zoning_1751_17582", "title": "Chapter 175 Zoning (§ 175-1 – § 175-82)", "file": "sections/chapter_175_zoning_1751_17582.md", "tags": ["dimensional", "use", "zoning"] }, ... ] } ``` --- ## 5. 数据质量保障 ### 5.1 双哈希审计链 每次爬取记录两个 SHA-256： | 字段 | 含义 | 用途 | |------|------|------| | `raw_content_hash` | 原始 HTTP 响应的哈希 | 证明原始数据未被篡改 | | `processed_content_hash` | 所有 sections 内容拼接的哈希 | 检测处理逻辑变更 | 通过比较两次爬取的 `raw_content_hash`，可以判断法规文本是否已更新。 ### 5.2 DB 审计链 ``` crawl_artifact.data_source_id → data_source.id → jurisdiction.id crawl_artifact.id ← policy.crawl_artifact_id ``` 每条 `policy` 记录都能追溯到具体的爬取产物（哪次爬取、哪个 URL、哪个原始文件）。 ### 5.3 内容质量分级 | 等级 | 标准 | 描述 | |------|------|------| | **A** | >100KB | 完整章节内容，含表格和正文 | | **B** | 10–100KB | 部分内容，可能缺少附录 | | **C** | <10KB | 仅目录页 / 平级 Section 结构 | | **D** | <1KB | 无法访问 / 错误页 | --- ## 6. 实例说明 ### 实例 1：ecode360 爬取 — Abington, MA **数据源**：`https://ecode360.com/AB2001` **特点**：Camoufox 绕过 Cloudflare，逐章节爬取 **爬取结果**： ``` data_source_id: 655c0581-ba0a-4371-967a-6048156cdbfe sections_count: 52 raw_size_bytes: 460,609 (原始 HTML 总量) processed_size: 241,137 (Markdown 总量) images: 1 张（pdf.gif 图标） ``` **目录结构**（52 个章节，每章节对应一个 .html 原始文件和一个 .md 分段文件）： ``` sections/ ├── chapter_c_charter_section_11_section_98.md ← 宪章 ├── chapter_11_animals_111_119.md ← 动物管理 ├── chapter_175_zoning_1751_17582.md ← Zoning（核心章节） ├── chapter_185_subdivision_control_1851_18523.md ← 土地细分 └── ... （共 52 个） ``` **Zoning 章节内容片段**（`chapter_175_zoning_1751_17582.md`）： ```markdown ## Chapter 175 Zoning (§ 175-1 – § 175-82) ### Article I Title, Authority and Purpose ### § 175-1 Adoption; statutory authority. ### § 175-2 Purposes. ... ### Article V Use Regulations ### § 175-18 Applicability of Table of Use Regulations. ### § 175-21 Table of Use Regulations. ... ### Article VI Dimensional and Density Regulations ### § 175-29 Dimensional and Density Regulations Table. ... ``` --- ### 实例 2：Municode 爬取 — Cambridge, MA **数据源**：`https://library.municode.com/ma/cambridge/codes/zoning_ordinance` **特点**：AngularJS SPA，23 个 Article，核心维度表在 Article 5 第 3 个 chunk 中 **爬取结果**： ``` sections_count: 23 processed_size: 1,426,398 (1.4 MB，最详细的城市之一) ``` **Article 5 维度表提取效果**（修复后）： 修复前（只取第一个 `.chunk-content-wrapper`，231 字节）： ``` No table content found in this article. ``` 修复后（收集全部 6 个 `.chunk-content-wrapper`，190KB）： ```markdown ## ARTICLE 5.000 - DEVELOPMENT STANDARDS ### 5.30 - DISTRICT DIMENSIONAL REGULATIONS | District | All Uses | Residential Uses | Non-Residential Uses | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | 1. Min. Open Space Ratio (5.22) | 2. Max. Stories Above Grade | 3. Max. Building Height in feet | ... | | Res. C-1 | 30%(1) | 4(2)(37) | 45(2)(37) | 10(3) | 5(4) | 35 | H+L(5)4 | 0.75 | | Res. C-1A | 15% | 6 | 75 | 10(3) | 5(4) | 45 | 10 | 1.25 | | Res. C-2 | 15% | 7 | 85 | 10(3) | 5(4) | 85 | H+L(5)4 | 1.75 | | Res. C-2A | 10%(10) | 6 | 75 | 5(3) | 5(4) | 60 | H+L(6)(9)5 | 2.5 | | Res. C-3 | 10% | 10 | 120 | 5(3) | 5(4) | 120 | H+L(6)5 | 3.0 | | Bus. A | none | 6 | 75 | none | none | 35 | none | 1.0 | | Bus. B | none | 7 | 85 | none | none | 80 | none | 2.75 | | Ind. A-1 | none | 6 | 75 | none | none | 45 | 0 | 1.25 | ...（共 37 行区划数据） ``` --- ### 实例 3：PDF 爬取 — Westford, MA **数据源**：`https://www.westfordma.gov/DocumentCenter/View/16935/` **特点**：14.7 MB PDF，pdfplumber 表格提取 + fitz 图片提取 **爬取结果**： ``` raw_size_bytes: 14,717,097 (14.7 MB 原始 PDF) sections_count: 58 processed_size: 596,373 images: 188 张（建筑示意图、区划图例等） ``` **图片文件列表（前8张）**： ``` images/ ├── page136_fig1.jpeg ← 第136页图1（建筑类型示意图） ├── page138_fig1.jpeg ← 第138页图1（建筑立面规范） ├── page138_fig2.jpeg ├── page138_fig3.jpeg ├── page139_fig1.jpeg └── ...（共188张） ``` **维度表提取效果**（Section 8.10.6）： ```markdown # Section 8.10.6 Dimensional Standards. | FIGURE 1. BLOCK STANDARDS | | | | --- | --- | --- | | Development Type | Max. Block Face Length | Max. Block Perimeter Length | | Mixed-Use Development | 450 Feet | 1,200 Feet | | Residential Development | 400 Feet | 1,200 Feet | | Key | Feature | Standard | | --- | --- | --- | | | Front setback, both sides | Per Section 8.10.6 Dimensional Standards | | | Sidewalk, both sides | 5' wide minimum | | | Tree belt, both sides | 6' wide minimum | | | On-street parking | None, one side, or both sides | | | Paved Roadway | 22' minimum, Maximum slope: 9% | ``` --- ### 实例 4：数据质量对比（ecode360 修复前后） 以 **Abington** 为例： | 指标 | 修复前（v0.3.0）| 修复后（v0.4.0）| |------|----------------|----------------| | sections | 1 | **52** | | raw_size | 3,002 bytes | **460,609 bytes** | | 表格 | ❌ 纯文字拼接 | ✅ Markdown 表格 | | 跨章节引用 | ❌ 链接丢失 | ✅ `[text](url)` 格式 | | 图片 | ❌ 未提取 | ✅ 下载到 images/ | | raw 文件格式 | `.txt`（纯文本）| `.html`（保留 HTML 结构）| 全量 ecode360 统计（122 个城镇）： | 指标 | 修复前 | 修复后 | |------|--------|--------| | 平均大小 | 57 KB | **447 KB** | | >100KB 城镇比例 | 6% | **100%** | | <10KB 城镇比例 | 93% | **0%** | --- ## 7. 批量爬取脚本 ```bash # 爬取特定来源类型 uv run python scripts/batch_crawl.py --type ecode360 # 限制数量（测试用） uv run python scripts/batch_crawl.py --type municode --limit 5 # 跳过已爬取（增量更新） uv run python scripts/batch_crawl.py --skip-existing # 全量爬取（所有类型，351 个城镇） uv run python scripts/batch_crawl.py ``` **监控进度**： ```bash # 查看实时日志（已完成城镇数） grep "✓\|✗" /tmp/recrawl_ecode360.log | wc -l # 查看 DB 统计 docker exec plotmax-postgres psql -U postgres plotmax_dev -c " SELECT source_type, count(*) AS crawled, round(avg(processed_size_bytes)/1024) AS avg_kb, count(*) FILTER (WHERE processed_size_bytes > 100000) AS high_quality FROM crawl_artifact GROUP BY source_type;" ``` --- ## 8. 已知局限与后续改进 ### 当前局限 | 问题 | 影响 | 说明 | |------|------|------| | `

      ` 内嵌链接丢失 | 低 | `

      ` 用 `get_text()` 提取，其中的 `` URL 不保留（文字保留）| | ecode360 平级 Section 结构 | 中 | 部分城镇使用 `§ Section` 平级结构（无 Article/Chapter 层级），目前只抓主页 TOC（~3KB），无法逐 Section 导航 | | PDF 表格识别率 | 中 | pdfplumber 基于线段检测，无边框表格（space-separated）识别效果有限 | | 图片语义 | 低 | 图片已下载但未 OCR / 未与正文关联（如"见图 3-1"） | | Zoning Map 未获取 | 中 | 空间数据（Zoning Map）通常是独立 GIS 图层，由 `spatial/` 模块单独处理 | ### 后续改进方向 1. **ecode360 平级 Section 修复**：对 `article_ids` 为空的城镇，尝试逐 Section 导航（`querySelectorAll('.contentTitle')`） 2. **`

      ` 内链保留**：将 `

      ` 处理改为递归 walk（保留内嵌 `` URL） 3. **PDF 无边框表格**：引入 `camelot` 库（lattice + stream 双模式） 4. **图片 OCR**：对包含数字数据的图片（如 Dimensional Schedule 截图）运行 Tesseract 5. **增量更新检测**：定期比较 `raw_content_hash`，自动触发重爬

docs.title: HTMLCrawler PDF Reroute (P73)

versions.content:
# HTMLCrawler PDF Reroute (P73)

> Operator note for the `_detect_response_type` helper added in v1.71.1.
> Audience: data ops investigating crawl artifacts where `raw/0_response.html`
> is actually a PDF binary; developers extending content-type detection.

---

## 1. Why this exists

Many MA towns publish their zoning bylaw on a CivicPlus
`DocumentCenter/View/<id>/Zoning-By-Laws-...` URL. The HTTP response is
`Content-Type: application/pdf` with PDF binary in the body, but the URL
itself does not carry a `.pdf` suffix — and the `zoning_code_source.platform`
field is `town_website_html` because the discovery pipeline saw a town-site
URL and bucketed it as HTML.

Pre-P73, `HTMLCrawler.fetch` ignored the response Content-Type on the
**primary** path (it did detect on the portal-follow path) and stored the
PDF binary as `raw/0_response.html`. Downstream:

- `BaseCrawler._store` saved 9 MB of `%PDF-1.7\n%����\n1 0 obj…` bytes as
  `0_response.html`
- `HTMLCrawler.clean` PDF-aware branch (`if raw.content_type == "pdf"`)
  did not fire because content_type was hardcoded `"html"`
- The processed text in `section_1.md` was raw PDF object stream, fully
  unparseable by the LLM extractor

Pre-P73 audit (v1.70.0) found 28 such cases in MA, including the largest
broken artifacts:

| Town | size | pre-P73 sections | source URL |
|---|---|---|---|
| Manchester-by-the-Sea | 9 MB | 1 | `/DocumentCenter/View/4818/Zoning-Bylaw-Final` |
| Abington | 7.8 MB | 1 | `/uploaded_file/4608/.../bylaws.pdf?disposition=inline` |
| Ipswich | 5.9 MB | 1 | `/DocumentCenter/View/14916/Zoning-Map-2016-Offiicial...` |
| Walpole | 4.5 MB | 1 | `/zoning-bylaw-as-amended-through-may-2025` |
| Lexington | 2 MB | 1 | `/DocumentCenter/View/7684/Zoning-Bylaw-PDF` |
| East Bridgewater | 1.3 MB | 1 | `/1761/Zoning-By-Laws-amended-2021-PDF` |

P73 makes the primary fetch path detect actual payload type via the same
helper used by the portal-follow path.

---

## 2. The helper

```python
class HTMLCrawler(BaseCrawler):
    @staticmethod
    def _detect_response_type(ct_header: str | None, body_head: bytes) -> str:
        """Return 'pdf' / 'zip' / 'html' from response signals."""
```

Decision table:

| Content-Type contains | Body magic (first 4 bytes) | Result |
|---|---|---|
| `pdf` | any | `pdf` |
| any | `b"%PDF"` | `pdf` |
| `zip` | any | `zip` |
| any | `b"PK\x03\x04"` | `zip` |
| anything else | anything else | `html` (safe default) |

Both call sites — primary `fetch` and `_follow_bylaw_links` — use the same
helper. Future regressions on either path break both together (DRY-by-test).

---

## 3. Output behavior when PDF detected

`HTMLCrawler.fetch` returns a single `RawContent` with:

- `content`: raw `response.content` (bytes — **not** `response.text`,
  avoiding the lossy UTF-8 decode that turned PDF binary into mojibake)
- `content_type="pdf"`
- HTTP metadata (`http_status`, `Last-Modified`, `ETag`) preserved

Then:

- `BaseCrawler._store` writes `raw/0_response.pdf` (extension table at
  `base.py:176` already maps `pdf` → `.pdf`)
- `HTMLCrawler.clean` PDF-aware branch (`html_crawler.py:948`) routes the
  content through `PDFCrawler.clean` → text extraction
- `ECode360Crawler.segment` (P72) splits the resulting text by inline
  `SECTION N.` / `ARTICLE N.` headings → `sections_count` jumps from 1 to
  10+ depending on bylaw length

---

## 4. CrawlArtifact.detected_type

P73 also threads `detected_type` from the crawler result through to the DB.

| `zoning_code_source.platform` | crawler reports | `CrawlArtifact.detected_type` |
|---|---|---|
| `town_website_html` (true HTML) | `"html"` | `html` |
| `town_website_html` (actually PDF) | `"pdf"` | `pdf` |
| `town_website_pdf` (PDFCrawler) | `"pdf"` | `pdf` |
| `arcgis_rest` (ZoningMap) | `None` | `gis_arcgis_response` (DETECTED_TYPE_MAP) |

`tasks.py:221` resolves with priority `result.get("detected_type") or
DETECTED_TYPE_MAP.get(source_type)` — crawler-reported value wins, falls
back to the static zoning_map map for GIS routing. The GIS auto-dispatch
check (`detected_type in ("gis_shapefile", "gis_geojson",
"gis_arcgis_response")`) is unaffected.

Note semantic split with the zoning_map vocabulary:

- **zoning_code** `detected_type`: `pdf` / `html` (P73, simple)
- **zoning_map** `detected_type`: `pdf_modern` / `pdf_scanned` /
  `image_modern` / `image_handdrawn` / `gis_*` / `unknown` (REQ-17, granular)

---

## 5. Verification

### Unit tests
```bash
uv run pytest tests/unit/crawler/test_p73_html_pdf_reroute.py -v
# 17 passed
```

### Live single-town smoke (East Bridgewater)
```bash
TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/login \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"username":"admin","password":"admin"}' \
  | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['token'])")

# Look up the source ID first (jurisdiction-scoped):
SID=$(curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/jdsr/bylaw-sources?status=all&limit=1&jurisdiction_name=East+Bridgewater" \
  | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['items'][0]['id'])")

curl -s -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  http://localhost:8000/api/v1/crawler/launch \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d "{\"source_id\":\"$SID\",\"force_recrawl\":true}"

# After job completes, verify the four invariants:
uv run python <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
from plotmax.core.database import sync_engine
from sqlalchemy import text
from plotmax.core.config import settings

with sync_engine.connect() as c:
    r = c.execute(text("""
        SELECT ca.sections_count, ca.detected_type, ca.storage_path
        FROM crawl_artifact ca
        JOIN zoning_code_source zcs ON zcs.id=ca.zoning_code_source_id
        JOIN jurisdiction j ON j.id=zcs.jurisdiction_id
        WHERE j.name='East Bridgewater' AND j.state_code='MA'
        ORDER BY ca.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    """)).first()
    print(f"sections_count={r.sections_count}  detected_type={r.detected_type}")
    raw_dir = Path(settings.data_dir) / r.storage_path / "raw"
    print(list(raw_dir.glob("*")))
# Expected:
# sections_count >= 10  (with P72 inline split)
# detected_type = 'pdf'
# raw_dir contains 0_response.pdf (NOT 0_response.html)
PY
```

### Bulk verification (deferred to post-P74)
The 28 PDF-mis-stored MA towns + 60 P72-bucket-C towns will be re-crawled in
a single batch after P74 (Municode rewrite) ships, validating the P72+P73+P74
combined effect on all 155 MA towns currently `sections_count<10`.

---

## 6. Known limitations

- **`_fetch_with_browser` (P65 force_browser path) not patched**: Camoufox
  rendering rarely returns PDF binary as page content (browsers trigger
  download dialogs instead). Defer until field evidence shows breakage.
- **Default fallback is `html`**: a server returning Content-Type
  `application/octet-stream` with non-magic body still routes to HTML.
  This is the pre-P73 behavior, preserved for safety. Add an `unknown`
  default if octet-stream HTML pages are observed in the wild.
- **`_detect_response_type` does not check XML / JSON / TXT**: the helper
  is intentionally narrow — only the formats that meaningfully change the
  crawl pipeline (PDF reroute, ZIP shapefile detection) are recognized.

docs.title: MunicodeCrawler Camoufox Switch (P74)

versions.content:
# MunicodeCrawler Camoufox Switch (P74)

> Operator note for the v1.72.0 fix to MunicodeCrawler.
> Audience: data ops debugging municode failures, developers extending
> the Municode pipeline.

---

## 1. Why this exists

Pre-P74 audit (v1.71.x) showed 46 MA municode towns — including Springfield,
Newton, Framingham, Wellesley, Belmont, Arlington (MA's 3rd–7th largest
cities) — with `processing_status='failed_empty'`, `sections_count=0`,
`processed_size=0`. The original BACKLOG entry described this as "silent
failure" with `processing_error=NULL`. Investigation found two distinct
issues:

### Issue 1: pre-P36 R1 phantoms (already addressed)

The 46 `failed_empty` artifacts were created `2026-04-02..06`, all **before**
the P36 R1 empty-fetch guard shipped on `2026-04-26` (commit `26d87b9`).
After P36 R1, an empty fetch raises `RuntimeError("0 RawContent items")`
upstream → `pipeline_job` is marked `failed` → no phantom artifact written.
`scripts/cleanup_phantom_artifacts.py` retroactively flagged the existing
46 stragglers as `failed_empty`, but the silent-failure code path itself is
already gone.

### Issue 2: MunicodeCrawler still uses raw Chromium (the actual P74 fix)

After P36 R1, the symptom shifted from "silent phantom artifact" to "every
force_recrawl raises `RuntimeError('0 RawContent items')`". The real
root cause turned out to be **two stacked issues** that surfaced sequentially
during QA:

1. **Browser fingerprint sniff**: Municode's user-agent detector flags
   "non-modern" browsers and short-circuits the SPA bootstrap with a
   ``Internet Explorer 9 and below are no longer supported`` stub page.
   Raw Chromium and Camoufox-default (random Linux/Mac/Win) both trigger
   this stub. **Fix**: pin ``os="windows"`` in `AsyncCamoufox(...)` so the
   fingerprint resolves to ``Firefox 135 on Windows 10`` — Municode accepts
   that and lets Angular bootstrap.
2. **Stale JDSR registry**: 3/5 sample MA towns (Pepperell, Wellesley,
   Newton) silently redirect from ``/ma/<slug>/codes/...`` to ``/ma`` (the
   Massachusetts state index page) within ~2 s — the towns were migrated
   off Municode but the JDSR `zoning_code_source.url` still points there.
   Pre-fix the crawler waited 18 s for TOC selector + another 4 s for
   library-page discovery (24 s total) before failing. **Fix**: detect the
   redirect within 2 s by comparing pre/post URL paths + state-index title
   pattern. Emit `step='not_on_municode'` so operators know to update the
   JDSR registry rather than chase crawler bugs.

Every other Cloudflare-protected source had already moved to Camoufox:

| Crawler | Pre-P74 | Post-P74 |
|---|---|---|
| ECode360 (`html_crawler.py:55`) | Camoufox | Camoufox |
| Amlegal (`amlegal_crawler.py:116`) | Camoufox | Camoufox |
| HTMLCrawler force_browser P65 (`html_crawler.py:677`) | Camoufox | Camoufox |
| **Municode** (`municode.py:50`) | **Chromium** | **Camoufox** ✅ |

Raw Chromium gets fingerprint-blocked by Municode's Cloudflare layer; the
TOC selector `a[href*='nodeId=']` never appears in the rendered DOM, the
18 000 ms wait times out, URL discovery also fails (the library index page
returns a generic state list when fingerprint-flagged), and `fetch()`
raises with no diagnostic detail.

P74 ships two changes:

1. **Camoufox import + driver swap**: `from camoufox.async_api import AsyncCamoufox`
   replaces `async_playwright`; `async with AsyncCamoufox(headless=True)`
   replaces the chromium `browser.new_context(...)` setup.
2. **Structured diagnostics** via `_MunicodeDiagnostics`: the helper records
   the failed milestone (`navigating` / `toc_wait` / `url_discovery` /
   `toc_collect` / `content_extraction`) plus the last error message, and
   emits a `RuntimeError(diag.format_error())` so `pipeline_job.error_message`
   reads `MunicodeCrawler failed at step='toc_wait': timeout 18000ms (url=…)`
   instead of the generic `0 RawContent items` placeholder.

---

## 2. Diagnostic flow

```
fetch()
  diag.step("navigating")        ──► page.goto() ─ on error: diag.error("goto failed: …")
  diag.step("toc_wait")          ──► wait_for_selector("a[href*='nodeId=']", 18000ms)
                                       │
                            timeout? ──┴── diag.error("TOC selector did not appear in 18000ms")
                                                │
                                                ▼
  diag.step("url_discovery")     ──► library.municode.com/ma/<slug>
                                       │
                            no /codes/ links? ──► diag.error("library index page yielded no /codes/ links")
                                                │
                                                ▼
  diag.step("toc_wait_after_discovery")  ──► retry on discovered URL
  diag.step("toc_collect")       ──► collect article nodeIds
  diag.step("content_extraction") ──► fetch each ?nodeId={id} article
```

Any `diag.error(...)` followed by `raise RuntimeError(diag.format_error())`
surfaces the step + last error to `pipeline_job.error_message` via the
existing `tasks.py:318-325` `except` block.

---

## 3. Debug bundle (gated)

Set `PLOTMAX_DEBUG_CRAWLER=1` in the environment to capture a screenshot +
DOM snapshot when fetch fails:

```bash
PLOTMAX_DEBUG_CRAWLER=1 \
  uv run python scripts/recrawl_municode_pilot.py --state MA --max 1 --apply
```

Bundle lands at:

```
data/debug/municode/<slug>_<UTC-ts>.png
data/debug/municode/<slug>_<UTC-ts>.html
```

`.gitignore` already excludes `data/`, so these don't pollute the repo.
Default state (env unset) skips the bundle to avoid disk inflation across
46 batch retests.

---

## 4. Verification

### Unit tests
```bash
uv run pytest tests/unit/crawler/test_p74_municode_diagnostics.py -v
# 12 passed
```

### Live single-town smoke (Newton)
```bash
TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/login \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"username":"admin","password":"admin"}' \
  | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['token'])")

SID=$(uv run python -c "
from plotmax.core.database import sync_engine
from sqlalchemy import text
with sync_engine.connect() as c:
    r = c.execute(text('''
        SELECT zcs.id FROM zoning_code_source zcs
        JOIN jurisdiction j ON j.id=zcs.jurisdiction_id
        WHERE j.name='Newton' AND j.state_code='MA' AND zcs.platform='municode'
        LIMIT 1
    ''')).first()
    print(r.id if r else '')
")

PLOTMAX_DEBUG_CRAWLER=1 curl -s -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  http://localhost:8000/api/v1/crawler/launch \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d "{\"source_id\":\"$SID\",\"force_recrawl\":true}"

# Wait 2-3 min, then verify result + error_message:
uv run python <<'PY'
from plotmax.core.database import sync_engine
from sqlalchemy import text
with sync_engine.connect() as c:
    art = c.execute(text("""
        SELECT ca.sections_count, ca.processing_status, ca.created_at
        FROM crawl_artifact ca
        JOIN zoning_code_source zcs ON zcs.id=ca.zoning_code_source_id
        JOIN jurisdiction j ON j.id=zcs.jurisdiction_id
        WHERE j.name='Newton' AND j.state_code='MA'
        ORDER BY ca.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    """)).first()
    print("artifact:", art)
    pj = c.execute(text("""
        SELECT pj.status, pj.error_message
        FROM pipeline_job pj
        WHERE (pj.config->>'source_type')='municode'
        ORDER BY pj.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    """)).first()
    print("pipeline_job:", pj)
PY
```

**Expected outcomes**:
- ✅ Pass: `sections_count > 5` and pipeline_job `status='completed'`
- ⚠️ Camoufox-still-blocked: pipeline_job `error_message` includes
  `step='toc_wait'` or `step='url_discovery'`. Inspect the screenshot at
  `data/debug/municode/newton_*.png` to see what page Camoufox actually
  rendered (Cloudflare challenge? login wall? generic state list?).

### Batch retest (46 MA municode towns)
```bash
# Canary: 10 towns first
uv run python scripts/recrawl_municode_pilot.py --state MA --apply --max 10

# If canary success ≥ 6/10 → run full 46
uv run python scripts/recrawl_municode_pilot.py --state MA --apply
```

Record numbers in this doc's section 6 below after each run.

---

## 5. Known limitations

- **Camoufox start overhead**: ~3–5 s per fetch vs raw Chromium's ~1 s.
  46-town batch ~ +2–4 min total — acceptable.
- **No fallback proxy**: if Camoufox is also blocked (e.g. Cloudflare
  Turnstile + active challenge), there's no Bright Data residential proxy
  hooked up. Follow-up P-item if observed in the wild.
- **Page type alias from playwright.async_api**: the module retains
  `from playwright.async_api import Page` for type annotations — Camoufox
  reuses Playwright's `Page` class. The runtime `async_playwright()` ctx
  manager is fully removed.
- **`scripts/recrawl_municode_pilot.py` unchanged**: existing pilot script
  invokes `MunicodeCrawler().fetch(...)` directly, automatically picks up
  the Camoufox switch with no script changes needed.

---

## 6. Live validation (post-fix, 2026-05-03)

Smoke run with `os="windows"` + pre-bounce detection landed:

| Town | Pre-P74 (chromium) | Post-P74 (Camoufox + os=windows + pre-bounce) |
|---|---|---|
| **Medford** (known-good) | RuntimeError, no diagnostic | ✅ **50 raws in 254s** |
| Truro | RuntimeError, no diagnostic | ⚠️ `step='toc_wait_after_discovery'` (45s) — page renders, TOC API returns "Content Not Found" (likely auth-required for this specific town) |
| Pepperell | url_discovery (24s) | ⚠️ `step='not_on_municode'` (**4s**) ✅ 6× faster |
| Wellesley | url_discovery (24s) | ⚠️ `step='not_on_municode'` (**4s**) ✅ 6× faster |
| Newton | url_discovery (24s) | ⚠️ `step='not_on_municode'` (**5s**) ✅ 6× faster |

Key takeaways:
- **Camoufox + os="windows" actually crawls Municode**: Medford produced
  50 articles end-to-end, proving the fingerprint fix works.
- **Most MA "failed_empty" towns are stale registry**: 3/5 sampled towns
  (Pepperell/Wellesley/Newton) redirect to the state index. Those need
  `zoning_code_source.platform` updated to the correct platform
  (likely `town_website_html` or `town_website_pdf` after rediscovery).
- **A few towns have TOC API auth issues** (Truro): the SPA renders the
  shell + fetches the TOC, but the API returns "Content Not Found".
  Whether this needs login or signals deprecation requires per-town
  investigation. Out of P74 scope.

## 7. Batch retest results

> Filled in after P74 ship + 46-town pilot run. Pre-fill template:

```
Run 1 (canary, --max 10) — YYYY-MM-DD
- Success (sections > 5): N/10
- Failed (toc_wait): N
- Failed (url_discovery, town not on Municode): N
- Other: N

Run 2 (full --max 46) — YYYY-MM-DD
- Success: N/46
- Per-step failure histogram: ...
- Notable cases: Newton (sections=K), Springfield (sections=K), …
```

docs.title: Segmenter In-Document Heading Split (P72)

versions.content:
# Segmenter In-Document Heading Split (P72)

> Operator note for the `segment_by_inline_headings` helper added in v1.71.0.
> Audience: data ops investigating crawl artifacts with `sections_count < 10`,
> developers extending segment behavior to new platforms.

---

## 1. Why this exists

Before P72, `ECode360Crawler.segment` (which `HTMLCrawler.segment` delegates
to) used a single rule: **one fetched file = one section**. Files were split
by the literal separator `"\n\n---\n\n"` produced by `clean()` when concating
multiple `RawContent` items.

This worked for ecode360 trees (each article fetched as its own URL) but
produced false negatives when a `town_website_html` source served the entire
bylaw as a single PDF or single HTML page. Examples found in the v1.70.0 MA
audit (155 / 351 towns with `sections_count < 10`):

| Town | platform | section_count | size | reality |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Alford | town_website_html | 3 | 115 KB | 1 file = full bylaw with 12 SECTIONs |
| East Bridgewater | town_website_html | 1 | 1.3 MB | 1 file = 133-page bylaw PDF |
| Manchester-by-the-Sea | town_website_html | 1 | 9 MB | 1 file = full bylaw PDF |

The downstream LLM extractor then ran against one giant un-tagged blob,
losing per-section attribution and confidence.

P72 adds a **second-pass split**: when a single file-boundary section is
oversized AND contains multiple inline headings, it is split into per-heading
sub-sections.

---

## 2. Trigger conditions

`segment_by_inline_headings(content)` returns `None` (caller keeps original
single section) unless **both** are true:

1. `len(content.encode("utf-8")) >= 30_000` (default `min_size_bytes`)
2. ≥3 distinct heading lines detected (default `min_headings`)

Both thresholds are conservative on purpose — small blobs and table-of-content
pages should not be split. Callers may override:

```python
sub = segment_by_inline_headings(text, min_size_bytes=20_000, min_headings=2)
```

---

## 3. Detected heading patterns

First match wins per line. Patterns mirror PDFCrawler's `header_patterns`
(consolidated in `plotmax/crawler/segmenter.py` at module level).

| Pattern | Level | Example |
|---|---|---|
| `^(?:ARTICLE\|Article)\s+([IVXLCDM]+\|\d+)[.:—–-]?\s+(.+)$` | 1 | `ARTICLE I. GENERAL PROVISIONS` |
| `^(?:CHAPTER\|Chapter)\s+(\d+)[.:—–-]\s+(.+)$` | 1 | `Chapter 4. ZONING DISTRICTS` |
| `^(?:SECTION\|Section)\s+([IVXLCDM]+\|\d+[\d.]*)[.:]?\s+(.+)$` | 2 | `SECTION 5. PARKING` |
| `^(?:SECTION\|Section)\s+([IVXLCDM]+\|\d+[\d.]*)[.:]?\s*$` | 2 | `SECTION 5` |
| `^(?:SECTION\|Section)\s+(?:One\|Two\|...)[.:\s].*$` | 2 | `SECTION ONE: PURPOSE` |
| `^(\d+\.\d+)\s+([A-Z][A-Za-z\s]+)$` | 3 | `1.2 ZONING DISTRICTS` |

Level conventions match the rest of the crawler:
- 1 = Article / Chapter (top-level container)
- 2 = Section
- 3 = Numeric sub-section (e.g. `§ 1.2`, `§ 4.5`)

---

## 4. Output shape

When split fires, each parent file-boundary section is replaced by its
sub-sections (the parent itself is **not** kept as a placeholder):

```
parent section "section_2"  (1 entry, 115 KB)
  ↓  inline split fires
sub-sections (12 entries, parent_id="section_2", level=2)
  • section_2_inline_1  "SECTION 1. TITLE, AUTHORITY AND PURPOSE"
  • section_2_inline_2  "SECTION 2. ESTABLISHMENT OF DISTRICTS"
  ... (10 more)
```

The heading line is preserved as the first line of each sub-section's
content, so the LLM extractor still sees `"SECTION 5. PARKING"` and can
attribute rules correctly.

`Section.parent_id` and `Section.level` (P51 fields) hold the hierarchy.
`meta.json::sections` records both for audit reconstruction.

---

## 5. Known limitations

- **OCR / scanned PDFs**: artifacts in `processing_status='needs_ocr'` (no
  text layer) won't have detectable headings; they remain 1 section. P72
  does not solve OCR — that's a separate scope.
- **Pre-heading preamble dropped**: lines before the first detected heading
  are intentionally discarded (they have no section to attribute to). If a
  bylaw starts with un-numbered front-matter like a town seal or table of
  contents, that text is lost. This is preferable to producing an
  "untitled" sub-section that confuses the LLM.
- **Word-number SECTIONs in PDFCrawler only**: PDFCrawler.segment retains
  its own copy of the word-number regex (`SECTION ONE:` etc.); P72's helper
  is a narrow second pass. The two implementations are intentionally
  decoupled to avoid regressing P52 PDF scan detection.

---

## 6. Verification

### Unit tests
```bash
uv run pytest tests/unit/crawler/test_p72_inline_heading_split.py -v
```

### Live single-town smoke (Alford)
```bash
TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/login \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"username":"admin","password":"admin"}' \
  | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['token'])")
curl -s -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  http://localhost:8000/api/v1/crawler/launch \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"source_id":"54dd1ce8-7537-413d-b885-bf407527f6cc","force_recrawl":true}'
# Then check sections_count after job completes:
uv run python -c "
from plotmax.core.database import sync_engine
from sqlalchemy import text
with sync_engine.connect() as c:
    print(c.execute(text('''
        SELECT ca.sections_count, ca.created_at FROM crawl_artifact ca
        JOIN zoning_code_source zcs ON zcs.id=ca.zoning_code_source_id
        JOIN jurisdiction j ON j.id=zcs.jurisdiction_id
        WHERE j.name=:n AND j.state_code=\\'MA\\'
        ORDER BY ca.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    '''), {'n': 'Alford'}).first())
"
# Expect: sections_count >= 10 (was 3 pre-P72)
```

### Bulk re-crawl (60 town_website_html bucket-C towns)
Defer until P73 (HTMLCrawler PDF reroute) ships — bucket-C includes towns
where the raw PDF is mis-stored as HTML and can't be split until P73 routes
them through PDFCrawler proper.

---

## 7. Future work

- **PDFCrawler refactor (post-P73)**: collapse PDFCrawler's internal
  `header_patterns` into the shared helper to remove duplication. Deferred
  because PDFCrawler.segment also has page-marker fallback logic that's
  unique to PDF text.
- **OCR integration**: pair P72 with an OCR pre-pass for `needs_ocr`
  artifacts. Separate P-item.
- **Heading recall on lowercase / title-case**: current patterns require
  `Article`/`ARTICLE`/`Section`/`SECTION`. If a town's bylaw uses
  `article 1` lowercase, recall = 0. Extend regex if observed in the wild.

docs.title: Typed Crawler Dispatch — Operator SOP

versions.content:
# Typed Crawler Dispatch — Operator SOP

> Production guide for the per-(platform × data_format) crawl control panel.
> Audience: data ops running pilot recrawls + force-recrawl after parser fixes.
> Status: P36 round-by-round delivery (R1 ecode360 → R2 municode → R3
> town_website_html → R4 town_website_pdf → R5 docs).

---

## 1. When to use this

Use the typed-crawler control panel when:

- **A new crawler bug fix landed** (e.g. P51 mgl/amlegal, P36 R1 ecode360) and
  prior artifacts of that platform need to be refreshed.
- **A pool of new candidates was just discovered** (e.g. P49 nationwide pipeline
  reclassified `unknown` rows into typed buckets) and you want to crawl them
  fresh in batch.
- **You want a small visual-QA pilot** before committing a force-recrawl across
  the entire pool — the standard P36 round flow.

For **single-row spot checks** (one source_id, one URL), use the existing
`/crawler/launch` page or `scripts/recrawl_*_pilot.py` script with hard-coded
pilot lists. Typed dispatch shines on bulk operations.

---

## 2. SOP — dry-run → run-N → force-recrawl

### Step 1: Login & token

```bash
TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/login \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"username":"admin","password":"admin"}' \
  | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['token'])")
```

Admin role required — typed-crawl campaigns burn compute + storage.

### Step 2: Inspect the bucket

```bash
curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/source-types/stats | jq '.bylaw'
```

Output shows per-(platform, data_format) counts:

```json
[
  {"platform": "town_website_pdf", "data_format": "pdf", "total": 12238, "crawled": 63, "pending": 12175},
  {"platform": "ecode360", "data_format": "html", "total": 3769, "crawled": 129, "pending": 3640},
  ...
]
```

### Step 3: Dry-run the candidates

```bash
# See which rows /run would enqueue without touching Celery
curl -s -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/source-types/ecode360/dry-run?limit=10" | jq .
```

Returns up to `limit` candidates with their `data_source_id`, URL,
`jurisdiction_slug`. Use this to sanity-check the pool before committing.

### Step 4: Run-N

```bash
# Enqueue 10 fresh crawls (default = exclude already-crawled rows)
curl -s -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/source-types/ecode360/run?limit=10" | jq .
```

Creates a `pipeline_job` with `job_type='typed_crawl'` as the parent batch, and
N child `job_type='crawl'` rows linked via `config.parent_job_id`. Track
progress on the standard `/pipeline` page.

### Step 5: Force-recrawl (after a parser fix)

```bash
# Same as Step 4 but includes rows that already have a CrawlArtifact
curl -s -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/source-types/ecode360/run?limit=50&force_recrawl=true" | jq .
```

The new artifact is appended; the prior one stays for audit. If you want only
the broken/stale rows, drive Step 5 from the audit script CSV (Step 6).

### Step 6: Audit-driven recrawl

```bash
# Generate broken list per platform
uv run python scripts/audit_bylaw_quality.py --platform ecode360 --export /tmp/broken_ecode360.csv

# Re-crawl the broken rows directly via the bypass-Celery CLI
uv run python scripts/rerun_bylaw_crawl.py --from-csv /tmp/broken_ecode360.csv
```

`rerun_bylaw_crawl.py` calls `_run_crawl` synchronously (no Celery worker
required). Good for pilot loops where you want per-row stdout visibility.

---

## 3. Per-platform thresholds (audit_bylaw_quality.py)

| platform           | min sections | min processed bytes | notes |
|--------------------|-------------:|--------------------:|-------|
| `mgl`              | 0            | 8,000               | mgl artifact = single chapter file; ``sections_count`` is segmenter output |
| `municode`         | 3            | 20,000              | typical Playwright municode 50–500 sections |
| `ecode360`         | 3            | 20,000              | Camoufox / Cloudflare-protected; expect 50–800 sections |
| `town_website_html`| 1            | 10,000              | generic fallback; varies wildly by town site |
| `town_website_pdf` | 0            | (raw ≥ 50,000)      | PDF section extraction can be 0 if scanned; rely on `raw_size_bytes` |
| `american_legal`   | 3            | 20,000              | + special check: ≥1 section with `parent_id != null` (P51 § split) |

Freshness window: 90 days. Skip with `--no-freshness` immediately after a
batch run.

---

## 4. Round-by-round bug taxonomy (P36)

### R1 — ecode360 (Camoufox + Cloudflare)

(Filled in once R1 closes. Common bug patterns observed:)

- **`articles_found count=0`** → DOM didn't render in time / Cloudflare
  challenge wasn't bypassed. Fix: extend `wait_for_timeout` after `goto`
  or add fingerprint variation.
- **`sec=1, size=3-6KB`** → `article_ids` list was empty so the crawler
  fell back to whole-page extraction. Same root cause as above.
- **TOC-only chapter** → page has many `.contentTitle` but no `.para`
  bodies; recurse into sub-articles via `_collect_sub_section_ids`.

### R2 — municode (Playwright + Angular)

(TBD — populated after R2 pilot.)

### R3 — town_website_html (generic fallback) — P52, v1.52.0

**Pilot**: 10 MA towns (Cheshire / Hopkinton / Shrewsbury / Holbrook /
Somerville / Rockport / Reading / Kingston / Monson / East Bridgewater).
Healthy reference towns produce 7-8 sections with 580KB-1.36MB processed
content. Three of the broken ones (Shrewsbury / Rockport / Somerville) turned
out to be **mis-classified sources** — their portal pages link exclusively
into other CMS platforms (municode / ecode360 / encodeplus).

Bugs found + fixes:

- **mis-classified portal → foreign-CMS extraction** (Shrewsbury / Rockport /
  Somerville pre-fix sec=1 size=65-77b). HTMLCrawler followed the link, fetched
  Angular SPA HTML, html_to_markdown stripped to chrome.
  *Fix*: ``_follow_bylaw_links`` skips hosts in ``_foreign_cms_hosts``
  (municode.com / library.municode.com / ecode360.com /
  codelibrary.amlegal.com / online.encodeplus.com / generalcode.com) and
  emits ``html_crawler_source_misclassified`` warning so operators reclassify
  via P35.
- **sub-page recursion infinite loop** (Shrewsbury hung 7+min). ``_follow_bylaw_links``
  recursed into CivicPlus ``/NNN/Page-Name`` sub-pages without a depth cap;
  each recursive call had a fresh ``seen`` set so the same sub-pages got
  re-fetched ad infinitum. *Fix*: ``_MAX_FOLLOW_DEPTH=2``.
- **SSE publish datetime crash masking every successful crawl** (every R3
  pilot row showed ``[ERR] Invalid transition: completed -> failed`` despite
  artifact being written). ``tasks.py`` published raw ``result`` to
  ``publish_event("job_complete", ...)`` containing un-isoformatted datetime
  → ``json.dumps`` raised → except clause called ``fail_job`` on the
  already-completed job. *Fix*: reuse ``result_summary_json`` (already
  isoformatted for DB write) for SSE payload too.

After fix: 10/10 R3 pilot rows succeed; 3 mis-classified sources still
return small artifacts but emit clear log warning. Operator action: reclassify
via P35 review UI or use the source row's actual platform crawler.

### Round 5 — zoning_map structured (P37) — v1.53.0

**Pilot**: 8 MA towns across 3 structured types + 3 MA towns across 3
unstructured types. Validates **typed crawl → zoning_districts auto-dispatch**:

- **arcgis_rest** 3/3 ✓ — Malden 69 districts / Winchester 7144 / Hopkinton 28.
  GIS processor (`plotmax/spatial/zoning_map/processors/gis.py`) reads the
  paginated GeoJSON output, projects to EPSG:26986, writes one
  `zoning_districts` row per polygon with `source_layer='gis_arcgis_response'`.
- **shapefile_zip** 0/2 ✗ — Colrain / Windsor zips both fail
  `Failed to open dataset` because the URLs aren't real shapefile zips
  (Colrain is a `Tarpon-Verizon_Variance.zip` document, Windsor is similarly
  mis-classified). Processor sets `processing_status='failed'` correctly with
  descriptive error — operator should re-classify these zoning_map_source
  rows via P35 (not a P37 bug).
- **axisgis_portal** 0/3 → **reclassified mid-pilot to needs_georef**.
  AxisGISPortalCrawler inherits `WebViewerCrawler` and downloads HTML
  viewer page bytes (not GeoJSON), so `gpd.read_file` always fails.
  Discovering the underlying ArcGIS REST endpoint inside the AxisGIS app
  is a separate P-item; for now treat as needs_georef.

Bugs found + fixes:

- **`tasks.py` never set `detected_type`** for any P50 zoning_map crawler →
  GIS processor's WHERE clause `detected_type IN (gis_shapefile, gis_geojson,
  gis_arcgis_response)` matched nothing → 0 new `zoning_districts` rows
  written despite 23 successful arcgis_rest crawls. *Fix*: `DETECTED_TYPE_MAP`
  per source_type + assignment in `_run_crawl` artifact constructor.
- **No automatic dispatch from crawl to processor** → operator had to manually
  run `processors/gis.py:process_batch` to ingest. *Fix*: after artifact
  commit, `await asyncio.to_thread(_run_gis_post_crawl, artifact_id)` runs
  the sync processor in a thread (avoids blocking event loop). Failures
  log-only, never fail the crawl (P52 R3 lesson).
- **Unstructured types had no sentinel** → image / pdf / portal artifacts
  would either trigger GIS processor (and crash) or be silently `pending`
  forever. *Fix*: `NEEDS_GEOREF_SOURCE_TYPES` frozenset → artifact
  `processing_status='needs_georef'` + skip GIS dispatch + future OCR / CV
  pipeline P-item picks up via status filter.

After fix: 3/3 arcgis_rest pilots ship `zoning_districts.crawl_artifact_id`
linkage; 3/3 unstructured pilots ship `needs_georef` status; reclassified
axisgis_portal sources also write `needs_georef` (no false-positive failure).

### R4 — town_website_pdf (PyMuPDF) — P52, v1.52.0

**Pilot**: 6 MA towns (Florida / Bridgewater / Hampden / Canton / Scituate /
Oakham). 5 healthy (8-400 sections); Florida MA was the audit-broken case
(sec=1 proc=0KB on 159KB raw PDF) — confirmed scan-only with no text layer.

Bug found + fix:

- **scan-only PDFs hit the P36 R1 empty-segment guard and fail the job**.
  Pre-P52 these sources had ``sec=0 proc=0`` artifacts that audit flagged but
  rerun would just fail again. *Fix*: PDFCrawler.fetch runs
  ``_is_scan_only(pdf_bytes)`` (PyMuPDF probe; threshold 500 chars total
  text) and on positive emits ``SCAN_SENTINEL`` content; ``segment()``
  returns one placeholder Section with ``tags=["needs_ocr"]``;
  ``tasks.py`` reads tag and sets ``crawl_artifact.processing_status='needs_ocr'``.
  Operator can now filter and route to OCR P-item without re-parsing meta.json.

After fix: Florida MA writes ``processing_status='needs_ocr'`` artifact;
healthy 5/6 don't false-positive (Bridgewater 400 sec / Hampden 212 / Canton
55 / Scituate 201 / Oakham 8).

---

## 5. Failure mode quick reference

| Symptom | Probable cause | First check |
|---|---|---|
| `RuntimeError: No crawler for source_type=X` | Source row's `platform` not in `CRAWLER_REGISTRY` | `rg "source_type = " plotmax/crawler/` |
| HTTP 403 / `Just a moment...` page captured | Cloudflare blocked Camoufox | rerun with delay, check ToB rate |
| sections_count == 1, processed < 5KB | Crawler hit fallback path (no article IDs) | inspect `articles_found` log line |
| sections_count high but content is chrome | Strip filter regression | compare `meta.json::sections[].title` to source site TOC |
| `crawl_artifact` written but `processed_content_hash` unchanged | Source page hasn't changed since last crawl — content_hash dedup | use `force_recrawl=true` if you actually want a new artifact |
| `processing_status='needs_ocr'` (P52) | Scan-only PDF with no text layer; PyMuPDF extracted < 500 chars | Reclassify or wait for OCR P-item; not crawler bug |
| `processing_status='needs_georef'` (P37) | Zoning_map source is image / pdf / portal / axisgis HTML — needs CV pipeline / browser rendering | Wait for OCR / CV pipeline P-item; not crawler bug |
| `zoning_districts.crawl_artifact_id` count = 0 after arcgis_rest crawl (P37) | GIS processor failed silently OR detected_type wasn't set | Check `crawl_artifact.processing_error` + `detected_type` columns; rerun if needed |
| `html_crawler_source_misclassified` log (P52) | town_website_html portal links exclusively into foreign CMS (municode / ecode360 / amlegal / encodeplus) | Reclassify source via P35 review — wrong source_type assigned |
| Sub-page hop recursion timeout (pre-P52) | `_follow_bylaw_links` recursed without depth guard | Fixed via `_MAX_FOLLOW_DEPTH=2`; should not recur |

---

## 6. Related files

- `plotmax/api/routers/admin/source_types.py` — control panel API
- `plotmax/jdsr/core/typed_crawl_resolver.py` — candidate resolver
- `plotmax/crawler/base.py:CRAWLER_REGISTRY` — source_type → Crawler class map
- `scripts/audit_bylaw_quality.py` — per-platform health audit
- `scripts/rerun_bylaw_crawl.py` — bypass-Celery batch CLI
- `web/app/admin/source-types/page.tsx` — operator UI (P50 C4)

docs.title: Classification Review UI (P35)

versions.content:
# Classification Review UI (P35)

**Status:** 📘 Active (since v1.46.0)

审核员在 `/jurisdictions/bylaw-sources` 与 `/jurisdictions/zoning-maps` 两张
队列页对**单条数据源**执行"看一眼上游 → 纠正分类 → 盖章审核"闭环的 UI
抽屉。此文档记录交互契约、后端端点与边界行为。

---

## 打开入口

列表每一行 **来源** 单元格现在有两个可点开详情的入口：

1. **点击 source_type badge** — 等价"详情"按钮的捷径；视觉上与 P38 版本
   历史入口（候选数 badge）并列，单候选城镇也可使用
2. **"详情"按钮** — 显式入口（与"历史"/"预览"/"site-scan" 并列在 actions
   列）

两者都把 `BylawSourceListItem` / `ZoningMapSourceListItem` 整行作为 `seed`
prop 注入 `SourceDetailDrawer`，抽屉打开时已有足够本地信息展示"当前分类"
snapshot，不用等后端请求。

---

## 三 Tab 结构

### 1. 识别详情（preview）

调用 `GET /api/v1/jdsr/sources/{source_id}/preview`，按 platform 分支返回
live-fetch 的"最有用的一眼信息"：

| Platform | 返回字段 | 来源 |
|---|---|---|
| `arcgis_rest` | `name` / `type` / `geometry_type` / `fields` / `max_record_count` / `layers[]` | `?f=pjson` 服务元数据 |
| `pdf_direct` / `town_website_pdf` / `data_format=pdf` | `file_size_bytes` / `page_count` / `title` / `producer` | HEAD（>20 MB 跳过）+ PyMuPDF |
| `municode` / `ecode360` / `american_legal` / `mgl`（有 CrawlArtifact） | `sections_count` / `fetched_at` / `raw_size_bytes` / `processing_status` | 最新 `crawl_artifact` SELECT |
| 同上（无 CrawlArtifact） | HTML `title` + 首 10 条 h1/h2 + `no_crawl_yet: true` | 降级到 html_title_headings |
| `town_website_html` / `arcgis_hub_webapp` / `axisgis_portal` / `html_attachment_child` | `title` / `headings[]` | 64 KiB HTML GET + 正则 |
| `image_direct` / `kml_direct` / `shapefile_zip` | `content_type` / `file_size_bytes` | HEAD only |
| 未知 platform | 降级到 HTML | — |

**永不抛错合约**：上游 4xx/5xx/timeout/parse 失败全部折叠为
`{"error": "fetch_failed: ConnectTimeout"}` 或 `{"error": "HTTP 404"}`；
端点 HTTP 仍返回 200，UI 渲染黄色 banner "上游抓取失败"。

边界：
- PDF：HEAD Content-Length > 20 MB → 只返回 `file_size_bytes` +
  `skipped_reason`，不下载（防护几十上百 MB 的 bylaw PDF）
- HTML：`resp.text[:MAX_HTML_BYTES]` 截断，正则提取 title + 前 10 条 h1/h2

### 2. 纠正分类（reclassify）

调用 `POST /api/v1/jdsr/{bylaw,zoning-map}-sources/{id}/reclassify`，body
`{use_probe: bool, use_llm: bool}` 控制 3 级分类器行级开关。

返回 `ReclassifyResponse`：

```json
{
  "old_source_type": "html_attachment_child",
  "old_data_format": "html",
  "new_source_type": "ecode360",
  "new_data_format": "html",
  "method": "rule",
  "confidence": 0.98,
  "suggestion_changed": true
}
```

- **只读预览**：端点不写 DB；UI 展示 current vs suggested chip 对比
- **接受建议**：用户点"接受建议（PATCH）"按钮后，调用既有
  `PATCH /{bylaw,zoning-map}-sources/{id}` 同时写 `platform` +
  `data_format`；PATCH handler 的 `classification_override` 标记会自动
  stamp `reviewed_at` / `reviewed_by = current_user.id`，让"接受分类建议"
  事件在队列 KPI 里明确出现在"已确认"分位

### 3. 审核历史（audit）

基于 `seed` 直接展示静态快照：`status` / `reviewed_at` /
`reviewed_by_username` / `notes`。详细版本历史与爬取时间线仍由 P38
`VersionHistoryDrawer` 承担（列表上"历史"按钮），两者定位互补。

---

## 权限

- reclassify 端点：`require_role("viewer")`（只读）
- PATCH 端点（接受建议）：`require_role("editor")`

---

## PATCH 审计补洞（important regression fix）

P35 C1 同步修复了一个 pre-existing 漏洞：PATCH 只带 `platform` /
`data_format`（审核员"我就改一下平台分类"）时过去**不会**盖章
`reviewed_at`。这让"接受分类建议"在 `/jurisdictions/*` 队列页的"已确认"
分位里完全消失，审核进度统计不准。

现在 PATCH handler 里：

```python
classification_override = False
if patch.platform is not None:
    ds.platform = patch.platform
    classification_override = True
if patch.data_format is not None:
    ds.data_format = patch.data_format
    classification_override = True
if classification_override and patch.verified is not True and patch.rejected is not True:
    ds.reviewed_at = datetime.now(UTC)
    ds.reviewed_by = user.id
```

约束：`verified=True` / `rejected=True` 同一请求里已经会盖章，避免
double-stamp；单 `url` 改动不算 classification override，因此不盖章。

---

## 关键文件

| 层 | 文件 |
|---|---|
| 后端 preview helpers | `plotmax/jdsr/core/preview.py` |
| 后端 preview endpoint | `plotmax/jdsr/core/api.py` — `GET /sources/{id}/preview` |
| 后端 reclassify + PATCH 审计 | `plotmax/jdsr/bylaw/api.py` + `plotmax/jdsr/zoning_map/api.py` |
| 前端抽屉 | `web/components/jdsr/source-detail-drawer.tsx` |
| 前端列表入口 | `web/app/jurisdictions/{bylaw-sources,zoning-maps}/page.tsx` |
| 测试 | `tests/unit/jdsr/test_p35_reclassify_and_audit.py` + `tests/unit/jdsr/test_p35_source_preview.py` |

---

## 未来扩展点

- 预览里把 ArcGIS `layers[]` 做成可点 chip，子 layer 一层探下去
- HTML 预览补 Playwright screenshot（P35 明确划出 scope 之外；若重新开
  PR，在 preview 后端增加 `playwright=True` 分支即可）
- reclassify method=llm 时展示原始 prompt + response（debug 需要）

docs.title: Classifier 写入唯一性（P45 修正）

versions.content:
# Classifier 写入唯一性（P45 修正）

> 范围：`plotmax/jdsr/core/classifiers.py` 及所有调用方（PATCH 端点、批量
> `classify-types` 端点、审核页 override、health check、scan_doc_dates、
> url_discovery、site_scanner、crawler.tasks）。
> 最后更新：v1.43.0（P45）。**红线已反转** —— 详见 §7。

---

## 1. 背景

P24（v1.26 → v1.28）把 `data_source` 按业务域拆成了两张新表：

| 表 | 承载 | CHECK 约束 |
|---|---|---|
| `zoning_map_source` | zoning_map 线 | `platform ∈ ZONING_MAP_PLATFORMS` |
| `zoning_code_source` | zoning_code（bylaw）线 | `platform ∈ ZONING_CODE_PLATFORMS` |

**v1.36（Alembic `k001_drop_legacy_data_source` + `m001_data_source_compat_view`）**
把原 legacy 表 `data_source` 彻底删掉，并用一个 `UNION ALL` VIEW 替身
保持读兼容。i002 的 dual-write trigger 同步下线。

这意味着 **`data_source` 现在是只读 VIEW**：

- SELECT：仍可用（ORM 层 `select(DataSource)` / `db.get(DataSource, id)`
  继续工作，读取两表的 UNION）
- INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE：**会被 PostgreSQL 直接拒绝**（CannotUpdateView）

P34 QA 首次暴露这个问题：`PATCH /bylaw-sources/{id}` 的 handler
走 `ds = await db.get(DataSource, id); ds.source_type = ...; db.flush()`，
单元测试（mock Session）全绿但生产环境 500。P45（v1.43.0）把所有残留
写路径一次扫干净，并**反转**原红线（从"只能写 legacy"改为
"不得写 legacy，必须写 split 表"）。

---

## 2. 新红线：应用代码不得写 `data_source`

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ 应用代码（classifier / PATCH / 审核 override / 批量重扫 /   │
│   health check / scan_doc_dates / url_discovery / crawler）  │
│                                                              │
│   唯一允许写入的对象 = split 表（ZoningCodeSource /          │
│                                   ZoningMapSource）          │
│                                                              │
│     ds = await get_source_row_by_id(db, id)                  │
│     ds.platform = ...       # split-table 列，CHECK 严格约束 │
│     ds.data_format = ...                                     │
│     ds.last_fetched_at = ...                                 │
│                                                              │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

                    data_source（VIEW）
                    ──────────────────
                    · 只读
                    · SELECT / db.get 仍可用
                    · 不能作为 UPDATE / INSERT 目标
```

**禁止**在应用代码里出现：

- `DataSource(...)` 实例化（= INSERT INTO data_source）
- `ds = await db.get(DataSource, id)` **后跟** 任何 `ds.<col> = <value>` 赋值
- raw `UPDATE data_source SET ...`
- raw `INSERT INTO data_source ...`

唯一例外：

1. **Alembic 迁移**（`alembic/versions/`）—— 可定义 / 重建 VIEW
2. **ORM 模型定义**（`plotmax/jdsr/core/models.py`）—— `class DataSource(...)`
   声明不是调用
3. **dispatch helper**（`plotmax/jdsr/core/service.py::create_data_source`）
   —— 拆分到两张 split 表，再用 `db.get(DataSource, row.id)` 读回 VIEW

这条红线由 `tests/unit/jdsr/test_p45_no_datasource_writes.py` 做 grep 静态
检查，每次 CI 都会执行。如果确有合法新增场景（比如未来增加
INSTEAD OF trigger 后允许部分写），把文件路径加入该测试的
`_ALLOWED_PATHS`，并在 PR 中说明原因。

---

## 3. 正确写路径（P45 helper）

`plotmax/jdsr/core/write_paths.py` 暴露两个入口：

```python
from plotmax.jdsr.core.write_paths import (
    SourceKind,              # Literal["zoning_code", "zoning_map"]
    get_source_row,          # (db, id, kind) → 指定 kind 的 row
    get_source_row_by_id,    # (db, id) → (row, kind) 多态查找
    model_for_kind,          # kind → ZoningCodeSource | ZoningMapSource
)

# 已知 kind（PATCH handler / 分类端点）
ds = await get_source_row(db, data_source_id, "zoning_map")
ds.platform = "arcgis_rest"
ds.data_format = "geojson"
await db.flush()

# 未知 kind（crawler task / raster fetcher / health ingest）
lookup = await get_source_row_by_id(db, data_source_id)
if lookup:
    ds, kind = lookup
    ds.last_fetched_at = now
    ds.content_hash = new_hash
    await db.commit()
```

UUID 在两张 split 表之间全局唯一（i001 迁移保证），所以
`get_source_row_by_id` 最多命中一行。

---

## 4. 三段分类流水线（rule → probe → LLM）

P34 v1.42.0 统一了三处分散的 URL 分类逻辑：

```
URL ──▶ [1] classify_rule      ──▶ hit → 返回 ClassifyResult(method='rule')
         └── miss ──▶ [2] probe_url (HEAD + magic bytes, 见 content_probe.py)
                      ├── definitive → 返回 method='probe'
                      └── 不确定 ──▶ [3] classify_llm (method='llm')
```

| Stage | 成本 | 准确率 | 何时用 |
|---|---|---|---|
| Rule  | 0（字符串匹配） | ~95%（见 audit） | 所有场景的第一步 |
| Probe | ~50ms（HEAD + 64KB partial GET） | ~99% for pdf/image/geojson | `allow_probe=True` 才开 |
| LLM   | ~0.5¢ / 次 | ~95%（LLM 看 URL） | 前两段全失败时兜底 |

调用入口：

```python
from plotmax.jdsr.core.classifiers import (
    classify_map_platform,   # 返回 platform ∈ ZONING_MAP_PLATFORMS
    classify_code_platform,  # 返回 platform ∈ ZONING_CODE_PLATFORMS
)
from plotmax.jdsr.core.write_paths import get_source_row

# 批量重扫 — 全开三段
cls = await classify_map_platform(
    url,
    allow_llm=True,
    allow_probe=True,
    http_client=shared_client,
)

# P45: 写到 split 表，不再写 DataSource
ds = await get_source_row(db, data_source_id, "zoning_map")
ds.platform = cls.source_type
ds.data_format = cls.data_format
```

**PATCH override 场景：** 审核员手工指定 `platform` / `data_format` 时
override 优先于 auto-classify。详见 `plotmax/jdsr/bylaw/api.py::patch_bylaw_source`
和 `plotmax/jdsr/zoning_map/api.py::patch_zoning_map_source`。

---

## 5. 准确率审计

`scripts/data/classify_ground_truth.csv` 维护 30+ 条精选 URL 的 ground-truth
标注，`scripts/audit_classification_accuracy.py` 在 rule-only 模式（关
probe + 关 LLM）跑一遍并验证命中率 ≥ 95%。CI 也跑这个检查。

```bash
uv run python scripts/audit_classification_accuracy.py
# ✅ PASS — accuracy 100.0% ≥ 95%
```

网络依赖的 probe / LLM 准确率**不**在这里审计 —— probe 阶段需要真实 URL，
放到 integration test / 手工采样里做。

CSV 格式：

```csv
category,url,expected_source_type,expected_data_format,note
zoning_code,https://library.municode.com/ma/acton/...,municode,html,municode domain rule
zoning_map,https://services.arcgis.com/.../FeatureServer/0,arcgis_rest,geojson,featureserver keyword
```

新增分类规则时请同步扩充 CSV，保证回归能被捕获。

---

## 6. 扩展到新业务域（方案 D 通用化）

未来要新增业务域（hearing_decision 听证会决议 / building_permit 建筑 permit
等），同一套红线同样适用：

1. **新表**：建一张 `{domain}_source` 表 + 独立 platform 枚举
2. **VIEW 扩展**：把新表加入 `data_source` UNION ALL view 的子查询，保持
   读兼容
3. **分类规则**：在 `classifiers.py` 加一个 `_classify_{domain}_rule` + 一个
   `classify_{domain}_platform` 公共 API，返回新域的 platform 枚举
4. **CMS Adapter**（P44 C3 框架）：若该业务域需要从 town 官网爬取，在
   `plotmax/jdsr/core/cms_adapters/` 增加对应 `Category` 枚举项
5. **写路径 helper**：扩 `write_paths.py` 的 `SourceKind` 联合 + dispatch
6. **准确率审计**：扩 `classify_ground_truth.csv` 增加新 category 行
7. **红线测试**：`test_p45_no_datasource_writes.py` 的 pattern 不用改
   （依然禁止写 `data_source`），写路径新增时只需补一个面向新表的
   assert-on-platform 集成测试

---

## 7. 历史参考

- v1.26（Alembic `i001`）：新 split 表 + 一次性历史快照迁移
- v1.27（Alembic `i002`）：`data_source_to_split_sync` trigger 上线（写
  legacy → 自动扩散到 split 表）
- v1.28（Alembic `i003`）：`crawl_artifact` / `health_check` / `discovery_log`
  新增双可空 polymorphic FK + ORM `source_kind` / `source_row` 访问器
- v1.36（Alembic `k001` + `m001`）：DROP legacy `data_source` table；用
  UNION ALL VIEW 替换；i002 trigger 随 table 一起被删除 → **VIEW 变只读**
- v1.42.0（P34）：三段分类流水线 + 原红线（方向错了，只暴露了一条 PATCH）
- v1.43.0（P45）：**红线反转**。PATCH / classify-types / cleanup /
  classify_zoning_maps / content_match rescore / url_discovery
  write_back / spatial site_scanner upsert / crawler task 后处理 sync /
  raster fetcher / health check / scan_doc_dates 全部切到 split 表。
  静态检查测试更名为 `test_p45_no_datasource_writes.py`。

docs.title: Multi-State Expansion — Operator SOP

versions.content:
# Multi-State Expansion — Operator SOP

> Workflow for taking a US state from "registered" to "live" production
> coverage. P41 (v1.54.0) introduced the `Jurisdiction.onboarding_status`
> lifecycle field; this document is the operator's checklist for using it.

**Audience**: data ops + admins

---

## 0. Current state of the registry (post-P48 baseline)

P48 already imported the entire US administrative hierarchy from Census:

| Layer | Row count | Source |
|---|---|---|
| State placeholders (`jurisdiction_type='state'`) | 50 + DC = 51 | P48 |
| Counties (`jurisdiction_type='county'`) | 3,130 | P48 (Census 2024) |
| Municipalities (`jurisdiction_type IN ('town','city')`) | 24,529 | P48 incorporated places |

**You do NOT need to "create" a state.** Every state already exists with
default `onboarding_status='not_started'`. MA is the only state currently in
production (`onboarding_status='live'`); every other state defaults to
`'not_started'` until an admin flips it.

---

## 1. Lifecycle states

```
  not_started ──┐
                ├──> planning ──> seeding ──> discovering ──> live
  paused <──────┘                                              │
                                                               │
  paused <─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

| Status | Meaning |
|---|---|
| `not_started` | Registered (P48 placeholder) but no work begun. Default for 50 states. |
| `planning`    | Onboarding scoped; budget approved; pilot towns chosen. P49 nationwide pipeline NOT yet started. |
| `seeding`     | County / municipality data being verified; missing counties imported. (P48 covers most states; some manual fix-ups remain.) |
| `discovering` | P49 nationwide pipeline running on this state — Brave + LLM finding official websites + bylaw + zoning_map URLs. |
| `live`        | At least one bylaw + one zoning_map source review completed; production-ready for end users. |
| `paused`      | Work intentionally halted (budget cap / blocker / data issue). Distinct from `not_started` — implies prior work exists. |

---

## 2. SOP — onboarding a new state

### Step 0: Decide the state + brief sanity check

```bash
# Verify the state exists in registry and has municipalities
TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/login \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"username":"admin","password":"admin"}' \
  | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['token'])")

curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  http://localhost:8000/api/v1/jdsr/states | jq '.items[] | select(.state_code=="MO")'
```

Expected: a row with non-zero `total_jurisdictions` + `total_counties`. If
either is 0, the state needs P48 re-import (see "Edge cases" below).

### Step 1: Flip → `planning`

```bash
curl -s -X PATCH -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"onboarding_status":"planning","reason":"Q2 expansion: kicking off Missouri"}' \
  http://localhost:8000/api/v1/jdsr/states/MO/onboarding
```

Or via UI: open `/jurisdictions`, find MO, admin context menu → "Update status".

### Step 2: Audit + fix counties (only if step 0 showed gaps)

```bash
# Verify county rows match expected count
uv run python -c "
import asyncio
from sqlalchemy import text
from plotmax.core.database import async_session_factory
async def main():
    async with async_session_factory() as s:
        r = await s.execute(text(\"\"\"
            SELECT COUNT(*) FROM jurisdiction
            WHERE state_code='MO' AND jurisdiction_type='county'
        \"\"\"))
        print('MO counties in registry:', r.scalar_one())
asyncio.run(main())
"
```

If counties are missing: rerun the relevant P48 backfill script
(`scripts/backfill_jurisdiction_counties_nationwide.py`).

Flip → `seeding` while running fixes:

```bash
curl -s -X PATCH ... -d '{"onboarding_status":"seeding"}' .../states/MO/onboarding
```

### Step 3: Run P49 nationwide pipeline (single-state subset)

```bash
# Open /pipeline/nationwide-urls in admin UI
# Select MO from state filter, run discover/verify/site-scan stages
# Pipeline writes official_website_url + creates zoning_code_source +
# zoning_map_source rows for each MO municipality
```

Flip → `discovering`:

```bash
curl -s -X PATCH ... -d '{"onboarding_status":"discovering"}' .../states/MO/onboarding
```

Monitor progress at `/pipeline/nationwide-urls` until the 3 stages settle.

### Step 4: Pilot crawl + audit

Use the P36/P52 pilot pattern. Pick 3-5 representative MO towns:

```bash
# Trigger typed-crawl for one platform pool at a time
curl -s -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/source-types/ecode360/run?limit=5"

# Audit health
uv run python scripts/audit_bylaw_quality.py
uv run python scripts/audit_zoning_map_quality.py
```

For zoning_map structured types (P37) — `arcgis_rest` / `shapefile_zip` /
`kml_direct` — verify `zoning_districts` rows are written.

### Step 5: Visual sign-off + flip → `live`

Operator opens 3-5 pilot towns at `/crawler/results/{slug}?state_code=MO`,
visually compares to the source site. When satisfied:

```bash
curl -s -X PATCH ... -d '{"onboarding_status":"live","reason":"5 town pilot signed off"}' \
  .../states/MO/onboarding
```

The state now appears in the `live` bucket on the `/jurisdictions` summary
card and is ready for end-user queries.

---

## 3. Edge cases

| Situation | Action |
|---|---|
| State has 0 counties or 0 municipalities | P48 missed it — rerun `scripts/backfill_jurisdiction_counties_nationwide.py` for that state, or import from a Census source |
| Pipeline produces lots of `processing_status='failed_empty'` artifacts | P36 R1 phantom-fetch guard fired correctly. Run `scripts/cleanup_phantom_artifacts.py` to flag, then `force_recrawl=true` after fixing the underlying source URLs |
| Many sources in `needs_georef` (PDF / image zoning maps) | Expected for image-heavy states. Wait for OCR / CV pipeline P-item; do not block the `live` flip |
| Need to halt work mid-stream | Flip to `paused` (preserves prior progress); flip back to the previous status when resuming |
| State has no zoning at the municipal level (e.g. HI) | Document in `reason` field; flip directly to `live` once county-level coverage proven |

---

## 4. Reference

- `Jurisdiction.onboarding_status` ORM column — `plotmax/jdsr/core/models.py`
- PATCH endpoint — `plotmax/jdsr/core/api.py:patch_state_onboarding`
- Service — `plotmax/jdsr/core/service.py:update_state_onboarding`
- Frontend summary card — `web/components/jurisdictions/onboarding-summary-card.tsx`
- Alembic migration — `alembic/versions/s001_jurisdiction_onboarding.py`

---

## 5. Auditing onboarding consistency

Run `scripts/audit_ma_registry.py` (P30) against any state to verify:

- Town count ≈ expected (Census incorporated places minus annexed/dissolved)
- Every town has `slug` populated
- No NULL counties on town rows (post-onboarding)
- Counties match the canonical Census count

The script is currently MA-specific; extending it to `--state CODE` is a
small follow-up (P-item recommended once 5+ states are live).

docs.title: 全国官网 URL 自动化管线（P49）

versions.content:
# 全国官网 URL 自动化管线（P49）

> **适用版本：** v1.48.0+
> **面向读者：** 数据运营、后端开发、排障

## 1. 背景与目标

P48 把 Jurisdiction 基线扩到了 50 州 + DC（3,130 county + 24.5K 城镇 +
27,648 个可运行 URL 自动化的 town/city/village/township），但触发动作仍
停留在"一个个 jurisdiction 按"——不适合全国规模。

P49 把三个已有的 per-row Celery task（P14 Discover · P31 Verify · P32/P33
Site-scan）串成一个**预算守护的自动化管线**，一次启动即可推动整个
`state_code='all'` 基线从 `not_started` 穿越到 `verified_pass` + 首轮
bylaw/zoning_map 候选。

## 2. 架构概览

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  POST /api/v1/jdsr/pipelines/nationwide-urls/start              │
│     body: { state_code, stages, limit, budget_usd, dry_run }    │
└──────────────────────────────────┬──────────────────────────────┘
                                   ▼
              start_pipeline(db, cfg)  ──── creates PipelineJob
              (plotmax/jdsr/core/nationwide_pipeline.py)
                                   │
                        dispatch first stage
                                   │
        ┌──────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────┐
        ▼                          ▼                           ▼
  Stage 1 Discover           Stage 2 Verify            Stage 3 Site-scan
  ─────────────────          ──────────────            ─────────────────
  candidate:                 candidate:                candidate:
    stage IN                   stage IN                  stage =
    (not_started,              (discovered,               verified_pass
     error)                     verified_partial)
  task:                       task:                     task:
    discover_jurisdiction      verify_jurisdiction       site_scan_
    _url                       _url                      jurisdiction
  outcome:                    outcome:                  outcome:
    stage →                    stage →                   bylaw +
    discovered /               verified_pass /           zoning_map
    verified_partial /         rejected /                candidates
    rejected / error           error                     upserted

                                   │
                   poll /pipelines/nationwide-urls/progress
                   (5s cadence while job is running)
                                   │
              orchestrator.advance_pipeline(job_id)
              — budget guard + drain check + stage advance
                                   │
                       all stages drained ⇒ status='completed'
```

**关键设计决策：**

- **Stage "链"靠 `jurisdiction.official_website_stage` 列本身**，不用
  Celery chord/chain。Stage 2 的 candidate 查询天然捡起 Stage 1 写入的
  `discovered` 行。优点：幂等重发、pause/resume 免去对 broker 的侵入。
- **预算守护双层：** start 时做预估 precheck（成本 > budget 即拒绝启
  动），运行时 `advance_pipeline` 按实际 completed 行成本再判一次。
- **错误捕获：** `url_service` 的 discover / verify 都包裹 try/except →
  写入 `official_website_error_reason` + `official_website_last_attempt_at`，
  stage 落入新的 `'error'` 字面量。Stage precedence：
  `rejected > verified_pass > error > verified_partial > discovered > not_started`。
- **27,648 × 3 stages × Gemini 2.5 Flash ≈ $43**（默认 budget $80 留了
  ~2× buffer）。单行 point estimate：discover $0.0005 · verify $0.0003 ·
  site-scan每个 verify_top_n $0.00015。

## 2.1 ⚠️ 运行前置条件（Prerequisites）

**启动任何真实 (non-dry-run) 管线之前必须确认以下 3 个进程全部在运行**，
否则 `discover_jurisdiction_url.delay()` / `verify_jurisdiction_url.delay()`
/ `site_scan_jurisdiction.delay()` 推进 Redis 的消息会**堆积在 broker
里无人消费**——进度 API 看起来 `running`，Jurisdiction 表却一动不动。

| 进程 | 启动命令（preview_start 名称） | 作用 |
|---|---|---|
| Postgres + Redis | `Postgres + Redis (Docker)` | ORM + Celery broker/backend |
| FastAPI Backend | `FastAPI Backend` | API 端点 + orchestrator |
| **Celery Workers** | **`Celery Workers (llm + crawl)`** | **消费 `llm` + `crawl` 两个队列的 task** |
| Next.js Frontend | `Next.js Frontend`（可选） | 运维看板 UI |

Celery worker 对应的完整命令：

```bash
uv run celery -A plotmax.core.celery_app worker -Q llm,crawl -c 4 --loglevel=info
```

- `-Q llm,crawl`：P49 的三个 task 都注册在 `llm` 队列；site-scan 内部会
  dispatch `run_crawl_job` 到 `crawl` 队列，worker 需要同时订阅
- `-c 4`：4 个并发 worker 进程（默认 preforking pool）。Gemini 2.5 Flash
  rate limit 很宽裕，但并发过高会触发数据库锁竞争，从 4 起步调
- `--loglevel=info`：能看到每个 `discover_jurisdiction_done` / `error`
  的单行摘要；正式生产可切 `warning` 减噪音

**健康检查：**

```bash
# worker 是否活着
pgrep -fa "celery.*plotmax" | head

# broker 队列深度（应 >0 if 你刚 enqueue、=0 if 已消费完）
redis-cli -n 0 LLEN llm
redis-cli -n 0 LLEN crawl

# 过去 10 分钟 Jurisdiction 有无 last_attempt_at 写入
uv run python -c "
import asyncio; from plotmax.api.main import app
from plotmax.core.database import async_session_factory
from plotmax.jdsr.core.models import Jurisdiction
from sqlalchemy import select, func
from datetime import datetime, UTC, timedelta
async def main():
    async with async_session_factory() as db:
        r = await db.execute(
            select(func.count()).select_from(Jurisdiction).where(
                Jurisdiction.official_website_last_attempt_at >= datetime.now(UTC) - timedelta(minutes=10)
            )
        )
        print('最近10分钟 attempt 写入行数:', r.scalar())
asyncio.run(main())
"
```

**如果 worker 没起来就启动了管线**：
1. 立即 `control action=cancel` 把 Job 标记为 cancelled
2. 清 Redis 队列避免 worker 一上线就消费过期消息：
   `redis-cli -n 0 DEL llm crawl celery`
3. 启动 worker，再重新 `start`（smoke 模式 limit=10 验证）

## 3. API 端点

| 方法 | 路径 | 权限 | 说明 |
|---|---|---|---|
| POST | `/jurisdictions/official-website/discover-batch` | editor | Stage 1 批量发现（state/county/stages/jurisdiction_ids 过滤，默认 `not_started + error`） |
| POST | `/jurisdictions/official-website/verify-batch` | editor | Stage 2 批量核验（P31 已有，沿用） |
| POST | `/pipelines/nationwide-urls/start` | editor | 三阶段 orchestrator 启动；支持 `dry_run=true` 预估成本 |
| GET | `/pipelines/nationwide-urls/progress?job_id=` | viewer | 返回最新一次（或指定）任务的 5-stage bucket + 成本累计 |
| POST | `/pipelines/nationwide-urls/control` | editor | `action ∈ pause / resume / cancel / retry_errors` |

## 4. 常见操作 Runbook

### 4.1 冒烟：单州 10 行 dry-run

```bash
TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/login \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"username":"admin","password":"admin"}' \
  | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['token'])")

curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/jdsr/pipelines/nationwide-urls/start \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"state_code":"CA","stages":["discover","verify","site_scan"],"limit":10,"dry_run":true}' \
  | jq .
```

期望响应：`status="completed"`（dry-run 立即结束）+ `estimated_cost_usd`
字段打印点数估计。

### 4.2 真跑：全国 Stage 1 only（最小风险首轮）

```bash
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/jdsr/pipelines/nationwide-urls/start \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"state_code":"all","stages":["discover"],"budget_usd":20.0}' \
  | jq .
```

随后 5s 间隔拉 progress：

```bash
curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/v1/jdsr/pipelines/nationwide-urls/progress \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" | jq '.stages, .total_cost_usd'
```

### 4.3 错误行重试

```bash
JOB_ID=$(curl -s ... progress | jq -r .job_id)
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/jdsr/pipelines/nationwide-urls/control \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d "{\"job_id\":\"$JOB_ID\",\"action\":\"retry_errors\"}"
```

### 4.4 超预算暂停后继续

若 `progress.budget_exceeded=true`，orchestrator 已把 job 置为
`cancelled`。调整 `budget_usd` 后 `action=resume` 会创建一个新 job，
stage candidate 查询自然捡起未完成行。

## 5. 前端 Dashboard

路径：`/pipeline/nationwide-urls`（sidebar "自动化管线" 分组）

- 顶部 form：state / smoke limit / budget / verify_top_n / dry-run +
  stages checkbox
- 最近一次任务卡：job_id · status · budget 进度条（超支变红）·
  错误率（超 30% 阈值红色标注）
- 三 stage 栏：candidates_total / done / in_progress / error / rejected
- pause / resume / cancel / retry_errors 按钮（仅 running 可见）
- 5s 自动轮询 progress，status != running 自动停止轮询

## 6. 成本与阈值

定义在 `plotmax/core/config.py` + `nationwide_pipeline.py`：

| 设置 | 默认 | 含义 |
|---|---|---|
| `nationwide_pipeline_budget_usd` | 80.0 | 27,648 × 3 stage × 约 $0.0016 ≈ $43 + 2× buffer（Gemini 2.5 Flash 定价） |
| `nationwide_pipeline_max_batch` | 200 | 单次 fan-out 的最大 row 数 |
| `nationwide_pipeline_error_rate_threshold` | 0.3 | progress.error_rate > 0.3 会触发 error_rate_exceeded 标志 |
| `COST_PER_DISCOVER_USD` | 0.0005 | Stage 1 single-row estimate |
| `COST_PER_VERIFY_USD` | 0.0003 | Stage 2 single-row estimate |
| `COST_PER_SITE_SCAN_VERIFY_USD` | 0.00015 | Stage 3 per-candidate verify |

切到 Claude Sonnet 时，把 budget bump 到 $500 + 调整三个 per-row 常量
（pricing 高约 20× 但 quality 也更高）。

## 7. 排障

| 症状 | 诊断 | 修复 |
|---|---|---|
| 400 `Brave Search API key not configured` | `settings.brave_search_api_key` 空 | 在 `.env` 设 `BRAVE_SEARCH_API_KEY=` |
| `budget_precheck_exceeded` 启动失败 | `estimate_pipeline_cost(total, stages, verify_top_n) > budget` | 要么加 budget，要么降 limit，要么只跑单 stage |
| error bucket 快速上涨 | Brave/LLM/HTTP 错误集中爆发 | `progress.stages[*].error` 看哪一阶段；`control action=retry_errors` 单独重试 |
| stage 卡死不前进 | 某批 Celery task 挂了或 rate-limited | `preview_logs "Celery Workers"` 看 worker 状态；`control action=cancel` 后 `resume` |

## 8. 相关文档

- [`jdsr/official-website-verification.md`](official-website-verification.md) — P31 Stage 2 逻辑细节
- [`jdsr/site-discovery.md`](site-discovery.md) — P32/P33 Stage 3 BFS 站内扫描
- [`brave_llm_pipeline.md`](../brave_llm_pipeline.md) — P14 Stage 1 picker
- [`jdsr/registry-data-sources.md`](registry-data-sources.md) — P30/P48 Jurisdiction 基线

## 9. 未来工作

- **Celery chord 替代 `advance_pipeline`：** 当前 advance 是被动调用（前端/
  手动 curl），可以挂一个 Celery beat 定时器 10s 戳一次，或在 per-row task
  完成钩子里回调。
- **`stages[*].in_progress` 精准化：** 现在靠 stage bucket 推断，不反映
  broker 里真实 running 的 task。后续接上 Flower inspect 或写入
  `pipeline_log` 做精确计数。
- **Stage 3 "done" 计数：** 目前在 progress 里返回 0（placeholder），正确
  算法应查 `zoning_code_source` + `zoning_map_source` 在该管线窗口内新增
  的行数，join `PipelineJob.started_at` 过滤。

docs.title: Official Website URL Verification (P31)

versions.content:
# Official Website URL Verification (P31)

> 状态：v1.37.0 — Production-ready on MA pilot

每个 `Jurisdiction` 拥有一个**官方网站 URL**（`official_website_url`）。P31
在其上叠加 5 态生命周期 + LLM 自动核验 + 人工审核闸门，支撑未来扩州到全美
的批量发现流水线。

---

## 状态机

```
                 ┌─────────────┐
                 │ not_started │  无 URL
                 └──────┬──────┘
                        │ submit_manual_url()
                        ▼
                 ┌─────────────┐
                 │ discovered  │  有 URL，未经 LLM 核验
                 └──────┬──────┘
                        │ run_verification()
          ┌─────────────┼─────────────┐
          │             │             │
          ▼             ▼             ▼
 ┌─────────────┐  ┌──────────────┐  ┌──────────┐
```
